title: T8: Dispatcher — proot gate + spawn qs-focus-dim.py
design: Extend FocusDim.qml with probeProc (proot detection) + dimProc (spawn helper) + restartTimer. Mirror FocusBorder.qml structure. See spec Task 8.

title: T9: End-to-end verification matrix
design: Walk verification matrix across X11/Wayland. File follow-up bd bugs for any ✗. See spec Task 9.

title: T6: Wayland overlay — focus-rect cut-out (4 rects)
design: Add fx/fy/fw/fh + hasFocus props. 4 Rectangle children (top/bottom/left/right). Visual check with hardcoded values then remove Component.onCompleted. See spec Task 6.

title: T7: Wayland overlay — sway IPC subscription
design: applyContainer + sway IPC mirrors FocusBorderWayland (lines 58-183) with borderOverlay→dimOverlay, borderVisible→hasFocus. Strip border-only props (bw/br/bc/inset). See spec Task 7.

title: T4: X11 overlay — mouse drag polling
design: XInput2 raw button1 press/release. Poll geometry @ 10fps while held. ImportError fallback for missing python-xlib. See spec Task 4.

title: T5: Wayland overlay — fullscreen dim + dispatcher + shell.qml mount
design: Create FocusDimWayland.qml (layer-shell PanelWindow, 30% black fullscreen, click-through). Create FocusDim.qml dispatcher (Sway detection via SWAYSOCK). Mount FocusDim {} in shell.qml. CRITICAL: verify bar stays bright (z-order). See spec Task 5.

title: T3: X11 overlay — i3 IPC live focus tracking
design: Subscribe to i3 window/workspace/binding events. Tree walk for focused leaf. Respect IGNORE_CLASSES + qs- prefix + fullscreen. Handle tabbed/stacked. stderr-log exceptions, i3-msg timeout 2s. See spec Task 3.

title: T2: X11 overlay — cut-out math (hardcoded TEST_FOCUS)
design: Replace fullscreen rect with 4-rect cut-out around TEST_FOCUS=(400,200,800,600). Per-monitor coord translation. See spec Task 2.

title: Epic: focus-dim overlay
design:
## Goal
30% black dim overlay outside focused window. Mirrors focus border lifecycle on X11/i3 + Wayland/sway.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] 30% black dim outside focused window rect, click-through, on X11 and Wayland
- [ ] Bar + quickshell overlays stay bright (z-order verified)
- [ ] Hides on fullscreen, ignored classes (quickshell/Rofi), no focused window
- [ ] Updates on focus/move/resize/workspace/binding events with <100ms lag
- [ ] Multi-monitor: cut-out only on focused monitor; others fully dimmed (X11). Wayland multi-mon inherits known border limitation.

## Approach
Sibling to FocusBorder. FocusDim.qml dispatcher → qs-focus-dim.py (X11 GTK cairo) or FocusDimWayland.qml (layer-shell). Mount in shell.qml.

## Spec
board/spec/focus-dim.md (9 tasks)

title: Epic: Quickshell sway compatibility
description: Extend quickshell to work on sway/WSL while keeping i3/X11 compatibility. Design: board/idea/quickshell-sway-compat.md. Success: (1) bar+overlay works on sway/WSL full-width, (2) i3/X11 unchanged, (3) QS_PHONE=1 enables phone style for future sxmo.

title: Epic: tmux SSH two-mode fat/thin architecture
description:
Goal: Replace single-mode tmux-ssh with two dedicated tools (tmux-to-workstation, tmux-from-workstation) that explicitly handle which side is fat (UI) and which is thin (persistence).

Success criteria:
- tmux-to-workstation: local thin, remote fat — connect/list/reconnect/cleanup local thin sessions
- tmux-from-workstation: local fat, remote thin — connect/list/reconnect/cleanup remote thin sessions
- Thin-local config with window title propagation via [remote-name]
- Thin-remote config copied to remote for persistence
- Survives UI/WM crashes, manual reconnect on SSH drop
- Existing tmux-ssh unchanged

Design doc: board/idea/tmux-ssh-rethink.md
